states.draft: Usable only when explicitly selected or no proven skill owns the task.
states.proven: Preferred over active skills when routing confidence is tied.
states.needs-healing: Use cautiously and route skill-garden or heal-skill as a sidecar.
states.deprecated: Do not route unless explicitly named by the user.

skill-garden.reason: Owns durable Codex behavior creation and repair.

stripe-webhook-integrity.reason: Stripe webhook and payment reconciliation owner.
